reviewCenter.title: Review Center
reviewCenter.subtitle: What is awaiting your decision today?
reviewCenter.emptyRecords: ✓ No payment proofs pending review — all receipts have been processed
reviewCenter.ruleRecordsTitle: Why are you reviewing these receipts?
reviewCenter.ruleRecordsDesc: Your role as treasurer or admin requires verifying that submitted receipts match recorded dues before confirmation.
reviewCenter.ruleDisbursementsDesc: Disbursement requests require authorized approval before execution. Your review ensures alignment with approved spending items.
reviewCenter.ruleDisputesTitle: Why are you reviewing these disputes?
reviewCenter.ruleDisputesDesc: As arbitrator or admin, you are responsible for resolving open disputes in accordance with entity regulations.
reviewCenter.invitationRuleExplanation: Membership requires an administrator review under the approved membership policy.
